releaseNotes: Watching on the TV no longer blocks the phone app: Multi-Screen frees its live connections when sent to the background and restores them when you return. Double-press OK on a movie or show now toggles play/pause cleanly with no menu popping out. Fast-scrolling with the Down button no longer jumps you back to the top of a list while posters are still loading. And the Home Continue Watching is now split into separate Movies and Series rows. Update from Settings -> Check for Updates.
